scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:front" --names backend,front --prefix-colors blue,green
scripts.dev:admin: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:admin-only" --names backend,admin --prefix-colors blue,yellow
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:front" "npm run dev:admin-only" --names backend,front,admin --prefix-colors blue,green,yellow
